entries.statement: Manage ongoing data quality during clinical trials, including query generation and resolution, serious adverse event reconciliation, medical coding review, and database lock preparation with documented clean-point verification.
Produce clinical data management documentation, including data management plans, data review plans, CRF completion guidelines, and database lock reports required for regulatory submission packages.
Conduct exploratory data analysis on new datasets, documenting distributional characteristics, data quality findings, and implications for modeling approach.
Define and maintain enterprise data quality standards, including dimensional targets, measurement methodology, scoring approach, and escalation thresholds by data domain.
Operate the data quality issue management process, including intake, prioritization, root cause assignment, remediation tracking, and closure verification.
Produce regular data quality reports for governance and business stakeholders, including trend analysis, high-impact issue summaries, and remediation progress.
Manage the MDM hub operations, including golden record maintenance, match review queues, merge/unmerge workflows, and survivorship rule updates.
Maintain the enterprise data catalog, including asset registration, metadata quality review, business context enrichment, and freshness monitoring.
Document and maintain data lineage for critical data elements and high-risk data flows, ensuring lineage is current and accessible to authorized consumers.
Define and maintain the data product roadmap, including consumer prioritization, capability dependencies, delivery milestones, and deprecation plans.
Manage the data product lifecycle, including launch, active management, deprecation, and consumer migration planning.
Monitor data product health against defined SLAs, managing consumer communications for SLA breaches and planned changes.
Implement and maintain data quality validation checks within pipelines, documenting quality rules, threshold definitions, and remediation procedures.
Implement and operate data observability infrastructure that provides pipeline lineage, execution history, data quality metrics, and proactive alerting for anomalies and SLA violations.
Define and enforce enterprise data quality standards, including dimensional targets, measurement processes, issue triage procedures, and escalation thresholds.
Monitor data quality within the assigned domain, document issues, initiate remediation workflows, and track resolution to closure.
